definitions.text: sette opp staker for å markere vei, sti eller lignende
definitions.translation: to set up stakes to mark a path or trail

examples.no: kommunestyret har staket ut en ny kurs
examples.en: the municipal council has mapped out a new course

examples.no: vi staket oss ut en ny politisk retning
examples.en: we mapped out a new political direction for ourselves
